description:
A member of the Kanze troupe and someone who truly understands Oniyasha. Because of a leg condition he`s had since childhood, he gave up on ever performing on stage, but he`s skilled at chanting and often helps Oniyasha with his practice. He`s a kind-hearted boy who cares deeply for both the Kanze troupe and Oniyasha.
Source: Official page
name: Ishiya
